name: Assalamualaikum Calon Imam
overview: Fisya, an energetic student suddenly caught up in a complicated fate. After losing his first love, Fisya instead engaged to Alif, her successor lecturer who was curt. But it turns out love comes in a way they didn't expect.

trailers.title: Assalamualaikum Calon Imam - Trailer | Miller Khan, Mentari De Marelle
